basic_details.job_title: RLDA Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 40 Posts
basic_details.department: Rail Land Development Authority, Ministry of Railways, Govt. of India
basic_details.short_information: Rail Land Development Authority (RLDA) Site Engineer Recruitment 2026: Get the latest RLDA recruitment notification 2026 for 40 Site Engineer (Civil/Electrical Engineering) vacancies under Rail Land Development Authority, a Statutory Authority of Ministry of Railways, Government of India. Applications are invited via email and the closing date is 22nd May 2026. Find RLDA vacancies across Pan-India on the official website rlda.indianrailways.gov.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming RLDA Site Engineer Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates

application_fee.details: No application fee is required for this recruitment. All eligible candidates may apply free of charge by submitting their application via the designated email ID.

age_limit.age_details: Short-term Contract basis (not regular); initially up to 1 year, extendable
age_limit.age_relaxation: Only the highest admissible relaxation shall apply (no cumulative relaxation)
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 45 years as on 22/05/2026 (closing date of the notification). Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India guidelines for SC/ST/OBC (NCL)/Ex-Servicemen/PwD candidates. If a candidate is eligible for age relaxation on two or more grounds, only the highest admissible age relaxation shall be applicable.

qualification.experience: Minimum 02 years of post-qualification experience in Central Govt. / State Govt. / Central Govt. PSUs / State Govt. PSUs / Other Private Organizations in relevant field of Construction / Development / Electrical work / MEP etc.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the closing date of application (22/05/2026). All qualifications must be from a recognized University/Institution approved by AICTE/UGC/Government of India. Only full-time regular courses shall be considered. Experience shall be counted after acquiring the minimum prescribed qualification. Internship/Apprenticeship/Training/Teaching/Academic/Freelancing experience shall not be treated as qualifying experience. | Educational Qualification

selection_process: Last drawn Gross Salary Weightage given
Relevant Work Experience Minimum 02 years in Civil Construction / Project Supervision — weightage given
Academic Performance Percentage marks in B.Tech (Civil / Electrical Engineering)
Post-Graduation Additional weightage for M.Tech qualification
Govt./PSU/Railways Experience Additional weightage for candidates who directly worked in Indian Railways / Central PSU / State PSU / Govt. Dept. for a minimum cumulative period of 01 year
Interview Only shortlisted candidates will be called
Assessment Authority RLDA reserves the right to assess candidates as per organisational and project requirements
Selection will be made on the basis of shortlisting followed by an Interview. In case the total number of applicants is high
RLDA will shortlist candidates based on the selection criteria given below
and only shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview. Engagement shall be purely on contract basis for an initial period of up to one year
extendable as per project requirement and satisfactory performance. One-month advance notice shall be required from either side for termination of contract.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted via email only to [email protected] and also by post to the RLDA address. Hard copy applications sent without the email will not be considered. The last date for receipt of applications is 22/05/2026. Candidates must fill the Application Form (Annexure-I) in block letters using a blue ball pen and attach all required documents as per the Annexure-II checklist. All documents and the application must be signed by the candidate on each page.

Candidates working in Government/PSU/Autonomous bodies shall give an undertaking regarding no dues or produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer at the time of interview. Candidature shall be provisional and subject to verification of documents and eligibility conditions.
Documents to be Submitted Along with Application:
Filled Application Form (Annexure-I) - in block letters, blue ball pen
Degree certificates and mark sheets (full set, all semesters)
Experience certificates indicating nature and duration of work
Category certificate — SC / ST / OBC-NCL / EWS (if applicable)
Last three months' payslips and Form-16 of last Financial Year (2025-26)
NOC / forwarding letter from current employer (if working in Govt./PSU/Railways on regular basis)

Documents to be submitted by email to [email protected] and also to: Deputy General Manager/HR, Rail Land Development Authority, Unit No. 702-B, 7th Floor, Konnectus Tower-II, DMRC Building, Ajmeri Gate, Delhi-110002. Phone: 011-23232854 / 011-23232835.
important_instructions: This engagement is purely temporary and contractual in nature — selection does not confer any right for regular employment in RLDA. Only full-time regular degree courses from AICTE/UGC/Government of India recognized institutions shall be considered. Internship, Apprenticeship, Training, Teaching, Academic or Freelancing experience shall not be treated as qualifying experience. No application fee is required. Candidates are advised to beware of touts or unscrupulous elements claiming to facilitate engagement through influence or illegal means. Govt./PSU employees must produce NOC or apply through proper channel. OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) candidates must submit a caste certificate issued during the current financial year (2025-26) clearly indicating non-creamy layer status. EWS candidates must produce an Income and Asset Certificate for 2024-25 issued during the current financial year. Selected candidates will be posted at any RLDA project location across India as per its requirement. Candidates must be medically fit and shall undergo medical examination at their own cost before joining. A police verification and clearance certificate shall be submitted before joining by selected candidates. No travelling, lodging or boarding expenses shall be reimbursed for attending the interview. Furnishing false/tampered documents or any misconduct will invite legal action, disqualification, debarment and/or termination. A candidate who refuses to join after issue of offer of appointment will be debarred from all future assignments in RLDA. Any dispute arising out of this notice shall be subject to the jurisdiction of Courts at New Delhi only. Candidates are advised to regularly visit https://rlda.indianrailways.gov.in under the Career section for any corrigendum, clarification or update. No correspondence shall be entertained from candidates found ineligible or not selected.

faq.question: Q1. What is the RLDA Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 and how many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: Rail Land Development Authority (RLDA), a statutory authority under the Ministry of Railways, has notified recruitment for Site Engineer (Civil/Electrical Engineering) on a short-term contract basis through Vacancy Notice No. 13/26/S.E. Contract dated 02/05/2026. A total of 40 tentative vacancies are available, out of which 30 are for Civil and 10 are for Electrical discipline, for various RLDA projects across India.

faq.question: Q2. What is the nature of engagement and duration of the RLDA Site Engineer contract?
faq.answer: The engagement of Site Engineers in RLDA is purely on a temporary, contractual basis and does not confer any right to regular appointment in RLDA. The initial contract period is up to 1 year, which may be extended based on project requirements and satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q3. What is the monthly salary for RLDA Site Engineer (Civil/Electrical) posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the post of Site Engineer (Civil/Electrical) will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 76,000/- per month, which is all-inclusive and subject to statutory deductions as applicable.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for RLDA Site Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a full-time B.E./B.Tech degree in Civil Engineering or Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/Institute with at least 55% marks (50% for SC/ST candidates). A higher qualification such as M.Tech is desirable and will carry additional weightage during the shortlisting/selection process.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum work experience required to apply for RLDA Site Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Applicants must possess a minimum of 2 years of post-qualification experience in Central Govt./State Govt./Central PSUs/State PSUs or other Private Organizations in relevant areas such as construction, development, electrical works, or MEP-related works. Internship, apprenticeship, training, teaching, academic or freelancing experience is not counted as qualifying experience for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit and age relaxation for RLDA Site Engineer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the post of Site Engineer is 45 years as on 22/05/2026, which is the closing date of the notification. Age relaxation for SC, ST, OBC (NCL), PwD, Ex-Servicemen and other eligible categories will be applicable as per Government of India guidelines, and only the highest applicable relaxation on any one ground will be considered (no cumulative relaxation).

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for RLDA Site Engineer Recruitment 2026 and what is the last date?
faq.answer: Candidates have to apply only through email by sending the duly filled Application Form (Annexure-I) and the checklist (Annexure-II) along with self-attested copies of required documents to the designated email ID: [email protected]. The last date for submission of applications is 22 May 2026, and applications must reach the specified email and postal address on or before this date as per the vacancy notice.

faq.question: Q8. What documents need to be attached with the RLDA Site Engineer application?
faq.answer: Candidates must attach the filled Application Form and checklist along with self-attested copies of matriculation certificate (age proof), degree certificates and mark sheets, experience certificates, caste/Category certificate (SC/ST/OBC-NCL/EWS, if applicable), last pay slips, and other relevant documents as prescribed in the notification and annexures. Applicants working in Government/PSU/Railways must also submit a No Objection Certificate (NOC) or forwarding letter from their employer at the time prescribed in the notice.
